error.title: Couldn't reach nanobot
error.gatewayHint: Make sure the gateway is running (`nanobot gateway`) and that this page is open on the same machine.

auth.title: Authentication required
auth.hint: Enter the secret configured as tokenIssueSecret in your gateway config.

account.logoutHint: Disconnect this browser from the gateway.

system.restartHint: Restart nanobot to apply runtime changes.

meta.description: Mini-Nanobot web UI — chat with your code workspace.

help.theme: Switch between light and dark appearance.
help.language: Choose the language used by the WebUI.
help.provider: Select the provider that should serve new model requests.
help.model: Set the default model name used by nanobot.
help.configPath: The gateway configuration file currently in use.
help.selectedPreset: Named presets are read-only here; edit them in config.json.
help.presetModel: Switch to Default to edit model and provider from the WebUI.
help.activityMode: Choose how much agent activity chrome to show by default.
help.codeWrap: Keep long code lines readable on smaller screens.
help.maxResults: Results returned by each web_search call.
help.timeout: Seconds before a search provider request times out.
help.jinaReader: Use Jina Reader for web_fetch when available.
help.imageGeneration: Expose generate_image in chats when a configured image provider is available.
help.imageProvider: Choose the registry provider used by generate_image.
help.imageProviderStatus: Image generation reuses provider credentials from Providers.
help.imageModel: Model name sent to the selected image provider.
help.defaultAspectRatio: Used when the prompt does not choose an aspect ratio.
help.defaultImageSize: Size hint sent to providers that support it.
help.maxImagesPerTurn: Upper bound for one generate_image request.
help.botName: Shown in runtime surfaces that use the configured bot identity.
help.botIcon: Short emoji or text shown beside the bot name.
help.timezone: IANA timezone used by runtime context and schedules.
help.toolHintMaxLength: Maximum characters shown in tool progress hints.
help.advancedReadOnly: Advanced safety controls are read-only in WebUI. Edit config.json intentionally when needed.

status.restartAfterSaving: Save changes, then restart when ready.
status.imageProviderRestart: Image provider changes saved. Restart when ready.

byok.description: Bring your own provider keys. Nanobot reads these values from the current config and only configured providers can be selected in General.
byok.apiKeyConfiguredPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current key
byok.apiKeyRequired: API key is required to configure this provider.
byok.configureFirst: Configure a provider in BYOK first.

webSearch.providerHelp: Choose the backend used by the web search tool.
webSearch.noCredentialHelp: DuckDuckGo works without a saved API key.
webSearch.apiKeyHelp: Stored in config and masked after saving.
webSearch.baseUrlHelp: SearXNG needs the URL of your own instance.
webSearch.apiKeyRequired: API key is required for this search provider.
webSearch.baseUrlRequired: Base URL is required for SearXNG.
webSearch.missingCredential: Add the required credential before saving.
webSearch.saveHint: Changes apply to new web search requests.

image.missingCredential: Configure this provider before enabling image generation.

chat.renameDescription: Choose a local sidebar name for this chat.

plan.title: Plan a change
plan.prompt: Study this project first, then propose a small, reviewable code change plan.

analyze.title: Analyze architecture
analyze.prompt: Analyze this project's architecture, core modules, data flow, and best places to make changes.

brainstorm.title: Design approach
brainstorm.prompt: Give me 2-3 implementation approaches for this feature, compare tradeoffs, and recommend the smallest viable path.

code.title: Modify code
code.prompt: Help me implement this code change. First confirm the files and plan, then wait for my confirmation before editing.

summarize.title: Check tests
summarize.prompt: Find the fastest relevant tests or build checks for the current change.

more.title: More engineering tasks
more.prompt: Show me a few engineering tasks you can help with in this code workspace, such as debugging, refactoring, tests, and architecture reading.

icon.title: Design an app icon
icon.prompt: Generate a clean 1:1 app icon for nanobot: friendly robot, simple vector style, soft blue and white palette, no text.

sticker.title: Make a sticker
sticker.prompt: Generate a cute sticker-style image of a tiny robot assistant, transparent-looking background, expressive and playful.

poster.title: Create a poster
poster.prompt: Generate a polished poster concept for a personal AI assistant, modern composition, strong visual hierarchy, suitable for a landing page.

product.title: Product mockup
product.prompt: Generate a clean product mockup image for a conversational AI web app, minimal interface, premium lighting, realistic device frame.

portrait.title: Stylized portrait
portrait.prompt: Generate a stylized portrait of a friendly AI companion, soft lighting, detailed but approachable, modern illustration style.

edit.title: Edit an image
edit.prompt: Help me edit an image. Ask me to upload or reference the image first, then generate the edited result.

composer.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

new.title: New chat
new.description: Stop the current task and start a fresh conversation.

stop.title: Stop current task
stop.description: Cancel the active agent turn for this chat.

restart.title: Restart nanobot
restart.description: Restart the bot process in place.

status.title: Show status
status.description: Display runtime, provider, and channel status.

history.title: Show conversation history
history.description: Print the last N persisted conversation messages.

dream_log.title: Show Dream log
dream_log.description: Show what the last Dream consolidation changed.

dream_restore.title: Restore memory
dream_restore.description: Revert memory to a previous Dream snapshot.

goal.title: Long-running goal
goal.description: Tell the agent to treat this as a sustained multi-step goal.

imageRejected.magic_mismatch: File doesn't look like a real image
imageRejected.too_large: Image is too large — try a smaller one

messageTooBig.title: Message too large
messageTooBig.body: The server rejected your last message because it exceeded the size limit. Remove some images or try smaller files, then send again.
